## Required checks

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace`
- [ ] Replayability is preserved
- [ ] Projection exposure is policy-bound
- [ ] No mutation bypasses lawbook validation

## v18 readiness evidence

- [ ] Chaos rehearsal plan was executed or explicitly marked plan-only
- [ ] Invariant fuzz run was executed through the harness
- [ ] Readiness blockers are resolved or covered by an expiring waiver
- [ ] High-priority creative suggestions have scheduled implementation jobs
